2026-04-21T16:25:42.2934867Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-21T16:25:42.2935949Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-21T16:25:42.2936922Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
